SELECT angle, cosh(angle) AS hyperbolic_cosh FROM hyperbolic_inputs;
SELECT cosh(x + 1.0) FROM hyperbolic_inputs AS hi CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1.0 AS x) AS addend;
SELECT cosh(angle) FROM hyperbolic_inputs WHERE angle BETWEEN -3.0 AND 3.0;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT angle, cosh(angle) AS hyperbolic_cosh FROM hyperbolic_inputs;
SELECT angle, hyperbolic_cosh FROM results WHERE hyperbolic_cosh > 10;
SELECT h.angle, cosh(h.angle) AS hyperbolic_cosh FROM hyperbolic_inputs h INNER JOIN (SELECT 0 AS dummy) d ON d.dummy = 0;
SELECT angle, (cosh(angle) + sinh(angle)) AS result FROM hyperbolic_inputs WHERE angle > 0;
